steps.title: Spot the balance pattern
steps.content: The passage emphasizes balanced character traits repeatedly: daring without being rash, prompt but not thoughtless, firm but not harsh. This pattern of strength-plus-restraint is what defines Robert.

steps.title: Interpret the pattern
steps.content:
Robert's balance — strong but controlled, decisive but thoughtful — is exactly what military leadership requires, so he is well suited to his role.

The other choices either focus on effort instead of fit (A), invent problems the passage doesn't mention (C), or describe independent action that isn't discussed (D).

That matches choice B — B is correct.
